intro: Optional tools and scripts that enhance the BAND-MAID Unofficial app or the broader BAND-MAID fan experience. These are not required to use the app.

tools.name: BAND-MAID Prime Video Describer
tools.description: Adds clickable track lists while watching BAND-MAID Prime live shows along with previous/next navigation to easily watch a multi-part performance
tips: Works with the BAND-MAID Prime Uliza video player
Jump directly to the track you want to see

tools.name: Fan Club Video Describer
tools.description: Adds a floating translation panel while watching OMEISYUSAMA-NO-KAI Fan Club videos. Uses the Vimeo postMessage API to sync translations with video playback progress.
tips: Works with the Fan Club Vimeo player
Same navigation panel as the Prime script
Movable translation panel location persists between sessions

tools.name: BAND-MAID Prime Playlist Builder
tools.description: Adds playlist building functionality to BAND-MAID Prime. Create named playlists, auto-advance between videos, and save playlists for later.
tips: Playlists are saved locally in your browser
Auto-advance plays the next video in your playlist automatically
Can be run together with the video describer but it will probably be too much on the screen. You can disable and re-enable either at will with Tampermonkey.

tools.name: Fan Club Playlist Builder
tools.description: Adds playlist building functionality to the OMEISYUSAMA-NO-KAI Fan Club site. Build, save, and auto-advance through named playlists.
tips: Separate saved playlists from the Prime playlist builder
Auto-advance works with the Fan Club Vimeo player
Can be run together with the video describer but it will probably be too much on the screen. You can disable and re-enable either at will with Tampermonkey.

tools.name: YouTube video finder
tools.description: Adds search bar on the BAND-MAID channel to easily find all BAND-MAID official content.
tips: Search song name shows ALL videos for that song (OMV, OLV, Audio, Shorts) with view counts*
All 338+ YouTube videos are included.
*Due to YT security restrictions the script should be re-installed occasionally to pick up new videos and view counts. The script is generated fresh each day but videos don't change often.

tools.name: Spotify Playlist AutoPlay
tools.description: Automates the play button between tracks in the Spotify Playlist view. Watches for the green 'Press play' banner via the browser window title, then sends the keyboard sequence to start the next track automatically. Restores focus to your previous window after each track starts.
tips: Since the add-on script to totally automate the player can get stuck occasionally, I won't add it directly to the app. The ability to bypass Spotify free-tier limits makes it worthwhile to tinker with so I'll make it available as an extra.
Launch Spotify Playlist here.
Requires AutoHotkey v2 to fully automate — free download from autohotkey.com
No additional libraries needed
Allows free-tier Spotify accounts to bypass the track selection limits of the Spotify app
Unlimited ad-free playback with Loop and Shuffle
Run the Spotify Playlist view in its own dedicated browser window for best results. (It must be the active tab)
To launch the AHK script, double click the BM-Spotify-AutoPlay.ahk script (after installing AutoHotKey)
Tray icon shows current status — right-click to Pause or Exit
TAB_COUNT in the script may need adjustment for browsers other than Edge
Occasionally the Spotify embed Play button is dead. To fix, just select the next track manually and press play.

tools.name: BAND-MAID Unofficial GPT
tools.description: GPT that is aware of the specific vocabulary of the Japanese rock band BAND-MAID and should offer an improved translation model. It also has substantial knowledge of the band, members, and catalog.
tips: GPT has been supplied with a glossary of BAND-MAID terms such as Master and Princesses, Okyuji, po, nicknames, etc. so it will translate accurately
GPT has been trained on nearly 20 extensive, major interviews with the band.
GPT is pre-programmed to assume the context of the queries will be BAND-MAID related and will answer as such.
Give as much context as possible. i.e. Translate this tweet from Kanami etc.

tools.name: BAND-MAID Font
tips: Double-click the TTF file to install.
Uppercase and lowercase letters are the same except for M, A, and T.
^ maps to the bow logo and ~ maps to a -po- glyph.
Give as much context as possible. i.e. Translate this tweet from Kanami etc.
